 1. Make sure you have correct branch name i.e. `ab_123_task_desc`, where `123` is a issue ID, and `ab` is an author
 2. Make sure you have meaningful title related to task i.e. `awesome pr title` with correct prefix: feat/fix/chore/style/docs/refactor
 3. Make sure all necessary sections are filled, remove obsolete sections
 4. Do a self review first
 5. Check if your PR includes only code related to your task
 6. Make sure you attached correct label i.e. `ready to review`, assigned yourself and added at least one reviewer
 7. `Notes` is used for additional info but also to notify if any action is required (i.e. migrations after merge)
-->
